selected_topic: Stellar Cocoons with Organic Molecules in Supernova Remnant
news_angle: Astronomers have uncovered stellar cocoons rich in complex organic molecules for the first time within a supernova remnant, revealing a new environment for organic chemistry in space.
why_this_is_news: This is the first discovery of complex organic molecule-rich stellar cocoons in the aftermath of a supernova explosion, highlighting a novel cosmic environment that could inform understanding of organic chemistry after star death.
specific_subject: stellar cocoons within a supernova remnant
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a cosmic explorer cat investigating glowing futuristic organic cocoons floating amid a colorful supernova explosion backdrop
image_prompt: stylish young orange tabby cat with mischievous confident grin, athletic compact build, sharp orange tabby markings, large expressive eyes, wearing a sleek black space helmet and cosmic streetwear, in dynamic pose floating inside glowing vibrant stellar cocoons filled with complex organic molecules, vivid supernova remnants with colorful nebula clouds and sparkles in background, cinematic anime style, energetic and adventurous vibe
easter_eggs: Hidden tiny floating molecules shaped like cat paws within the glowing cocoons
caption: Astronomers have spotted glowing stellar cocoons rich in complex organic molecules inside the wreckage of a supernova. Hunk Mao's ready to explore this cosmic chemistry party—space just got weirder and cooler!
risk_notes: Ensure no corporate logos; avoid generic space cat appearances; maintain distinct Hunk Mao features and dynamic pose.
